title: Nephrodium amabile
taxonomy: Nephrodium amabile is classified as a species of fern within the family Matoniaceae. It belongs to the phylum Pteridophyta and the division Pteridophyta as well. The genus Nephrodium is an outdated classification and has been replaced with various other genera, but for historical purposes, it is often referred to under its original classification. The Matoniaceae family is a group of ferns that are native to various parts of the world, including Asia and the Pacific Islands. The exact classification of Nephrodium amabile may vary depending on the source and the level of taxonomic detail desired.
